name: Kaeris
title: Iron-Threaded

abilities.name: Extra Parts
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model kills a model, it may make a Scheme or Remains marker within 1" of the killed model.

abilities.name: Fast Cast
abilities.text: This model's Charge action may generate (+) actions instead of (////) actions.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

actions.name: "Up We Go!"
actions.effects: Place the target anywhere within 3" of its current location.

actions.name: Grand Conflagration
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives a (-) if the target has a Burning token.
actions.effects: Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Kindle
triggers.text: Target must have a Burning token. Deal 1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Blast
triggers.text: When resolving, deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Blazing Barrier
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Fire) token.

actions.name: Overclock
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another allied construct only. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: Target gains a Hastened token, then declares an action.

triggers.name: To the Limit
triggers.text: Once per turn. If the target has not activated this turn, it may do so after this model ends its activation.

actions.name: Summon the Swarm
actions.effects: Summon a Steam Arachnid within 1" of the target.

extraction_notes: Limit Test ability appears to have no text visible on this card front
Totem 'Eternal Flame' shown in bottom-right corner
